text: Good evening. Before we close the day, let’s take a few minutes to reflect.
How did today feel overall?
options: Smooth and productive|Mixed with ups and downs|Mostly challenging|Draining and frustrating
answer=Smooth and productive|Mixed with ups and downs:A1_Q_HIGH;answer=Mostly challenging|Draining and frustrating:A1_Q_LOW

text: When things went well, what made the difference?
options: My preparation|Decisions I made in the moment|Support from others|Things just worked out

text: When things didn’t go as planned, what was your first instinct?
options: Focus on what I could still control|Wait for direction or help|Feel stuck and unsure what to do|Think the situation was out of my hands
answer=My preparation|Decisions I made in the moment:A1_R_INT;answer=Support from others|Things just worked out:A1_R_MIX
answer=Focus on what I could still control:A1_R_INT;answer=Wait for direction or help|Feel stuck and unsure what to do|Think the situation was out of my hands:A1_R_EXT
